details: Compound diEtMEA (N,N-diethyl-monoethanolamine) is real and identified correctly via Table 1 row 8. BP=161 °C matches paper. boiling_point per Tb column. Measured (table of literature physical constants of free bases). DOI 10.3390/pharmaceutics2020136 matches paper (Fini 2010, Pharmaceutics).

Compound 16 in paper named '[4-(4-Benzylphthalazin-1-ylamino)benzoylamino]acetic acid methyl ester'—an alternate but correct designation for the methyl ester of the N-(4-benzylphthalazin-1-yl)-p-aminohippuric acid. mp 165-167 °C verbatim in experimental section. Property melting_point. Measured. DOI matches.
Compound 24 N,N-(Di-n-cyclohexylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid; 46% yield; mp 209–211 °C in section 4.2. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/ph19020256 matches paper.

Compound 8d 3,14-Dihydrobenzo[5′,6′]chromeno[2′,3′:4,5]imidazo[1,2-a]pyrrolo[2,3-e]pyridine: Beige solid yield 44%, mp 273–276 °С (dec). Property decomposition (explicit '(dec)' label). Measured. DOI 10.1055/s-0036-1589496 matches.

Table 5 row 27 '2-me-2-butanol  6.4444  3.0353  102.0  107.1  −5.1' confirms experimental BP 102.0 °C for 2-methyl-2-butanol. Compiled literature compilation of experimental values. boiling_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/ijms12042448 matches.
Compound 6 1-(2,4-Difluorophenyl)-2-(2-nitro-1H-imidazol-1-yl)ethanone, 'Measured melting point: 128–130 °C' in section 4.1.3. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/molecules28227461 matches paper.

Compound 5b N,N-bis-[(3,5-dimetyl-4-iodo-1H-pyrazol-1-yl)-methyl]-4-chloroaniline (paper spells 'dimetyl'; extractor spells 'dimethyl' which is correct standard form). Yield 84%; mp 101–102 °C. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/antibiotics15020127 matches.
Compound 16a '5-[2-Ethoxyquinazolone-3-yl]-2-phenylthiadiazole': Brown crystals from DMF; m.p. 172–173 °C. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/ph4071032 matches.
Table 5 row 20 '4-heptanol  10.1183  2.9916  155.0  156.7  −1.7' confirms experimental BP 155.0 °C. boiling_point, measured (compiled literature). DOI 10.3390/ijms12042448 matches.

Compound 47 4′-((((1′-(1,2-Dihydroxy-4-methyl-6-oxo-1,6-dihydropyridin-5-yl)ethylidene)amino)oxy)methyl)methyl benzoate: Rf=0.10 (AcOEt), m.p. 120 °C (dec.). Property decomposition correct ('(dec.)' label). Measured. DOI 10.3390/molecules29122942 matches.

Section 3.7.9 Compound 8i '2-(3-Acetyl-1-(phenyl)-5-((R)-p-tolyl)-1,2,4-triazolo-4-yl)-2-deoxy-1,3,4,6-tetraacetyl-β-D-glucose'; greenish-yellow cubic crystals (60% yield) with mp 148–150 °C. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/molecules29122839 matches.

Compound 8b '6-(hydroxyamino)-6-oxohexyl 4-(2-hydroxyphenyl)-6-methyl-2-oxo-1,2,3,4-tetrahydropyrimidine-5-carboxylate': MW=377.41 g/mol; white solid; M.P. 149–151 °C. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.1039/d6ra00701e matches.

Compound 13 'Methyl 4-(((1,3-dioxoisoindolin-2-yl)oxy)methyl)benzoate': Pink solid (758.3 mg, 99%), Rf=0.53 (CH2Cl2), m.p. 155–158 °C. Paper uses en-dash; extractor uses hyphen — minor whitespace/unicode mismatch noted in CSV. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/molecules29122942 matches.
Compound 11 '3-Hydroxy-2,2-dimethyl-3-phenylbutanoic acid; C12H16O3; Mw=208.26; Melting point: 89 °C'. melting_point, measured. source pmc:PMC3685236 matches paper folder.

Compound 2d 'N‐(1‐Benzylpiperidin‐4‐yl)‐2‐Propylpentanamide Hydrochloride': White solid (349 mg, yield 70%): mp 164°C–165°C. Midpoint value 164.5 °C correct. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.1002/cmdc.202500922 matches.
Compound 4m '1-(4-trifluoromethylphenyl)-1-(2-fluorophenyl)-O,O-dipropylphosphonate'. Yield 28.0%; m.p. 109-111°C. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/80100186 matches.

Review-paper compiled value: 'amorphization and aggregation of CoQ10 because of its low melting point (ca. 48 °C)'. Coenzyme Q10 mp ~48 °C. melting_point, measured (compiled in review). Relation '~' correctly captures 'ca.'. DOI 10.1016/j.apsb.2025.11.036 matches paper.

reason: Property subtype mismatch per overlay disambiguation
details: Table II row 26 shows compound 26 (4-(4''-thiazolidinone-2''-acetylazino)-4'-acetylthiosemicarbazone diphenyl sulphide) with M.p. = '300°C' and no 'decomp.' annotation. Rows 9, 10, 12 explicitly add 'decomp.'; row 26 (and 23, 24, 25) do not. Per overlay rule, a bare value in a table without decomp. label = melting_point, not decomposition. Q2 (property type) fails. Existing flag is correct and is preserved.

Compound 6 '2-(5-hydroxy-2-nitro-phenyl)-4,6-dimethyl-1,2-dihydropyridine-3,5-dicarboxylic acid diethyl ester': m.p. 206-208°C (hexane/ethyl acetate). melting_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/60800683 matches.

Table 5 row 24 '2-me-1-propanol  4.5000  2.6351  107.9  103.7  4.2' confirms experimental BP 107.9 °C for 2-methyl-1-propanol. boiling_point, measured (compiled literature). DOI 10.3390/ijms12042448 matches.
Table 5 row 17 '3-pentanol  6.8194  2.8850  115.3  120.0  −4.7' confirms experimental BP 115.3 °C. boiling_point, measured (compiled literature). DOI 10.3390/ijms12042448 matches.

Compound 26b-1 '((4R,6R)-6-((E)-4-Iodo-3-methylbut-3-en-1-yl)-2,2-dimethyl-1,3-dioxan-4-yl)methyl 2,4,6-triisopropylbenzenesulfonate': [α]D25 = +2.00 (MeOH, c = 0.5); mp 55−57 °C. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.1021/acsomega.4c03241 matches.

Compound 9c '2-[4-(4-phenyl-1-piperazinyl)butyl]-1-phenyl-1,2-dihydropyridazine-3,6-dione': obtained in 71% yield, m.p. 91-93 °C (methanol-H2O 4:1). melting_point, measured. DOI 10.3390/60900784 matches.

Compound 5a '4-((1-((1-(2-Bromobenzyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-4-yl)methyl)-1H-indol-3-yl)methylene)-5-methyl-2-phenyl-2,4-dihydro-3H-pyrazol-3-one': Yellow solid (0.390 g, 97%), mp 178−180 °C. melting_point, measured. DOI 10.1021/acsbiomedchemau.4c00060 matches.
Compound 2 '3-Hydroxy-2,2-dimethyl-3,3-diphenylpropanoic acid; C17H18O3; Mw=270.32; Melting point: 162 °C'. melting_point, measured. source pmc:PMC3685236 matches paper folder.
